payload.answer: This request is too broad to store as a single durable memory. Please choose a narrower, specific memory scope.
citations: For context, Remember everything about AI.
Role contract: Generate repair/user-choice options only; do not decide, commit, append, merge, overwrite, supersede, or mark anything as saved.
repair_options: Specify a narrower topic area to remember about AI (for example: tools, research interests, work context, or preferences).
List a few concrete AI facts or preferences to store separately rather than as one broad memory.
If you want a standing preference, rephrase it as what should be remembered about AI, not everything about AI.
Keep this as an open-ended note and confirm the exact details later.
